title: Neon Boost
description:
Neon Boost is a frenetic First Person Platformer based on mechanics like Rocket-Jump or Wall-Run. Run across 3 different worlds to get the best times!

Run, Wall-Run, Slide, and most importantly, use your weapon to Rocket - Jump and get over the obstacles!Features• 72 levels (36 standard levels + 36 "Lights Off" variants)

• Alternative Game Mode: Lights Off

• An original Synthwave-inspired soundtrack

• Achievements!
Play on 3 different worlds:• Laser City

• Tesla World

• Cosmic Highway
Game Mode: Lights OffEach level has an alternative version where you have to reach the goal with limited visibility.
description_short: Neon Boost is a frenetic First Person Platformer based on mechanics like Rocket-Jump or Wall-Run. Run across 3 different worlds to get the best times!
